title: No Good Men
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: Seven stories of justice as it is actually practised on the rain-slick streets of Varangantua - a city where the law is a job, not a virtue, and most of the people doing it would rather not have to remember their day. Probators chasing inquiries that pay better than they should; sanctioners running into walls they were not warned about; ordinary citizens trying to live one more month without becoming a case file. Chris Wraight, Darius Hinks, Gareth Hanrahan, Graham McNeill, Guy Haley, Marc Collins and Nick Kyme each take a corner of the same hive and show how the Imperium's largest exports are inequality and the people willing to enforce it.
